message:
⚡ TRUMP-O-METER — 2026-04-18
────────────────────────────────────
Mood:    TRIUMPHANT
Target:  Iran / Economic messaging to working class
────────────────────────────────────
Aggression       ███████░░░ 7/10
Erraticism       ██████░░░░ 6/10
Market Risk      ██████░░░░ 6/10
Geo. Tension     ████████░░ 8/10
Dom. Heat        ██████░░░░ 6/10
────────────────────────────────────
COMPOSITE    6.6/10
────────────────────────────────────
📡 Trump is simultaneously projecting strength through military threats and populist economic wins (no tax on tips, tariffs) while maintaining an energized, combative posture. His messaging blends nationalist swagger with tangible policy wins designed to solidify working-class support.
